creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
scf         2009-04-05 23:52:37 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository (src committer)

  Modified files:
    devel/p4v            Makefile distinfo.amd64 distinfo.i386 
  Log:
  Update p4v to 2008.2.193639.
  
  Tweak the layout to allow distfiles to be shared between multiple
  architectures (i386 and amd63) and push it under the perforce directory
  also used by devel/p4.
  
  PR:             ports/133402
  Noticed by:     pav
  Approved by:    pav
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.28      +3 -3      ports/devel/p4v/Makefile
  1.5       +3 -3      ports/devel/p4v/distinfo.amd64
  1.19      +3 -3      ports/devel/p4v/distinfo.i386
